main_functions.description: User can create account using email and password.

sub_functions.description: Email uniqueness must be validated during account creation.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that the system rejects duplicate email addresses and allows unique ones.

sub_functions.description: Password length must be between 8 and 12 characters.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that the system accepts passwords with length between 8 and 12 characters and rejects passwords outside this range.

sub_functions.description: Test the complete account creation flow with valid email and password, including successful submission and confirmation.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that a user can successfully create an account with a unique email and a valid password, and receive a confirmation.

sub_functions.description: Test system behavior when account creation fails due to network issues, server errors, or invalid input formats beyond uniqueness and length.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that the system handles non-validation errors gracefully, such as network failures or server errors, without data corruption.

main_functions.description: User must verify email before first login.

sub_functions.description: System sends verification and user completes verification before first login.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that the system prevents login for unverified accounts.
Verify that the system allows login only after successful email verification.

sub_functions.description: Test that the verification email is sent to the correct email address and contains a valid verification link.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that the verification email is sent to the user's email address and the link is functional.

sub_functions.description: Test that the verification link expires after a certain time and that the user can request a new verification email.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that an expired verification link is rejected and the user can request a new verification email.
